c_omelette_1.name: The Omelette
c_omelette_1.effect: No blind rewards, extra-hand money, or interest; start with 5 Egg Jokers.
rules: All Blinds give no reward money.
Extra Hands no longer earn money.
Earn no Interest at end of round.
restrictions: Banned Vouchers: Seed Money, Money Tree.
Banned Jokers: To the Moon, Rocket, Golden Joker, Satellite.

c_city_1.name: 15 Minute City
c_city_1.effect: Start with Eternal Ride the Bus and Eternal Shortcut on a face-card-only deck.
c_city_1.deck: Two copies of every face card; no Aces, 2s, or 3s.

c_rich_1.name: Rich get Richer
c_rich_1.effect: Chips cannot exceed current money; start with $100 and Seed Money plus Money Tree.

c_knife_1.name: On a Knife's Edge
c_knife_1.effect: Start with an Eternal, leftmost-pinned Ceremonial Dagger.
rules: The Pinned Joker is always in the leftmost position.

c_xray_1.name: X-ray Vision
c_xray_1.effect: One in four drawn cards is face down.
rules: 1 in 4 cards are drawn face down.

c_mad_world_1.name: Mad World
c_mad_world_1.effect: No extra-hand money or interest; start with Negative Pareidolia and Business Card on a 2–9 deck.
rules: Extra Hands no longer earn money.
Earn no Interest at end of round.

c_luxury_1.name: Luxury Tax
c_luxury_1.effect: Hold one fewer card for every $5 owned; start with hand size 10.
rules: Hold -1 cards in hand for every $5 you have.

c_non_perishable_1.name: Non-Perishable
restrictions: Banned Jokers: Gros Michel, Cavendish, Ice Cream, Turtle Bean, Ramen, Diet Cola, Seltzer, Popcorn, Mr. Bones, Invisible Joker, Luchador.

c_medusa_1.name: Medusa
c_medusa_1.effect: Start with Eternal Marble Joker; all face cards in the deck are Stone cards.
c_medusa_1.deck: 52 cards, with all face cards replaced by Stone cards.

c_double_nothing_1.name: Double or Nothing
c_double_nothing_1.effect: Played cards become debuffed after scoring; every starting card has a Red Seal.
c_double_nothing_1.deck: Standard 52-card deck, all with Red Seal.
rules: All Played cards become debuffed after scoring.

c_typecast_1.name: Typecast
c_typecast_1.effect: After defeating the Ante 4 Boss, all Jokers become Eternal and Joker slots become 0.
rules: When Ante 4 Boss is defeated, all Jokers become Eternal and Joker slots are set to 0.

c_inflation_1.name: Inflation
c_inflation_1.effect: Every purchase permanently raises prices by $1; start with Credit Card.
rules: Permanently raise prices by $1 on every purchase.

c_bram_poker_1.name: Bram Poker
c_bram_poker_1.effect: Jokers do not appear in shops; start with Eternal Vampire, Emperor, Empress, Magic Trick, and Illusion.
rules: Jokers no longer appear in the shop.

c_fragile_1.name: Fragile
c_fragile_1.effect: Start with two Eternal Negative Oops! All 6s on an all-Glass deck.
restrictions: Banned Jokers: Marble Joker, Vampire, Midas Mask, Certificate.
Banned Tarots: The Magician, The Empress, The Hierophant, The Chariot, The Devil, The Tower, The Lovers.

c_monolith_1.name: Monolith
c_monolith_1.effect: Start with Eternal Obelisk and Eternal Negative Marble Joker.

c_blast_off_1.name: Blast Off
c_blast_off_1.effect: 2 hands, 2 discards, and 4 Joker slots; start with Eternal Constellation, Eternal Rocket, Planet Merchant, and Planet Tycoon.

c_five_card_1.name: Five-Card Draw
c_five_card_1.effect: 6 discards, hand size 5, and 7 Joker slots; start with Card Sharp and Joker.
restrictions: Banned Jokers: Juggler, Troubadour, Turtle Bean.

c_golden_needle_1.name: Golden Needle
c_golden_needle_1.effect: Discards cost $1; 1 hand and 6 discards per round; start with $10 and Credit Card.

c_cruelty_1.name: Cruelty
c_cruelty_1.effect: Small and Big Blinds give no reward money; only 3 Joker slots.
rules: Small Blinds give no reward money.
Big Blinds give no reward money.

c_jokerless_1.name: Jokerless
c_jokerless_1.effect: Jokers do not appear in shops and Joker slots are set to 0.
rules: Jokers no longer appear in the shop.
restrictions: Banned Joker sources: Judgement; Wraith and The Soul; Uncommon, Rare, Negative, Foil, Holographic, Polychrome, Buffoon, and Top-up Tags; Crimson Heart, Verdant Leaf, and Amber Acorn; all Buffoon Packs.
